arts.sum: Robert Lewandowski scores a hat-trick inside 32 minutes to fire Barcelona to a commanding 3-0 victory over Alaves at Mendizorroza.

arts.ttl: Robert Lewandowski stars as Barcelona restore three-point advantage with victory at Alaves
arts.sum: Barcelona have responded to Real Madrid’s victory against Villarreal on Saturday with a win of their own. The Catalans had the match won in the first match, eventually securing a 3-0 victory at Alaves. Robert Lewandowski was the main man for Barcelona, as he netted a hat-trick. arts.sum: Real Madrid’s victory over Villarreal on Saturday has meant that Barcelona’s lead at the top of La Liga has been wiped out. Hansi Flick’s side have the chance to re-establish their three-point lead with a win at Alaves, and so far, they are on course to achieve that after scoring an early opening goal. arts.ttl: Report: Barcelona are set to rival Newcastle for 'one of the best strikers in the world'
Mikel Arteta pushes Arsenal to sign the ‘new Lamine Yamal’
arts.sum: Arsenal manager Mikel Arteta is pushing for Arsenal to sign a Barcelona wonderkid who has been labelled as the ‘new Lamine Yamal ’. Although he is older than the 17-year-old Yamal, who inspired Spain to Euro 2024 glory this summer, Pradas has been described as something of a clone of his Barcelona teammate.
